sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id UInt32, x_value Float64, y_value Float64, category String) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_data (id, x_value, y_value, category) VALUES (1, 1.1, 2.2, 'A'), (2, 2.2, NULL, 'B'), (3, 3.3, 4.4, 'A'), (4, 4.4, -5.5, NULL), (5, -5.5, -6.6, 'B');
SELECT corr(x_value, y_value) FROM test_data WHERE category NOT IN (SELECT category FROM test_data WHERE id < 3);
SELECT category, corr(x_value, y_value) AS correlation FROM test_data GROUP BY category HAVING corr(x_value, y_value) NOT IN (SELECT corr(x_value, y_value) FROM test_data WHERE id > 2);
CREATE TABLE temp_series (i UInt32, x_value Float64, y_value Float64) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO temp_series (i, x_value, y_value) SELECT id, x_value, y_value FROM test_data WHERE id NOT IN (1, 2, 3);
SELECT corr(x_value, y_value) AS correlation FROM temp_series WHERE x_value NOT IN (SELECT x_value FROM test_data WHERE x_value IS NOT NULL);
SELECT id, x_value, y_value FROM test_data WHERE (x_value, y_value) NOT IN (SELECT x_value, y_value FROM test_data WHERE category = 'A' AND x_value > 2.0);
CREATE TABLE join_test (a UInt32, b Float64, c Float64) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO join_test VALUES (1, NULL, 3.3), (2, 5.5, NULL), (3, 7.7, 8.8), (4, -1.0, -2.0);
SELECT corr(t1.b, t2.c) FROM join_test AS t1 JOIN join_test AS t2 ON t1.a NOT IN (SELECT a FROM join_test WHERE c IS NULL) WHERE t1.b IS NOT NULL AND t2.c IS NOT NULL;

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT x_value, y_value FROM test_data WHERE category NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT category FROM test_data WHERE category IS NOT NULL) GROUP BY x_value, y_value) AS sub WHERE corr(x_value, y_value) IS NOT NULL;
